title: sagraea portoricensis
intro: Sagraea portoricensis is a plant species native to Puerto Rico, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The roots of Sagraea portoricensis have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
